---
title: The Position of the Midlatitude Storm Track and Eddy-Driven Westerlies in Aquaplanet
  AGCMs
pagetitle: 2010-12-1-Lu2010 - Gang Chen
body-classes: publication-page
format:
  html:
    title-block-style: none
year: 2010
author: Jian Lu, Gang Chen and Dargan M. W. Frierson
venue: Journal of the Atmospheric Sciences
venue_cit: <i>Journal of the Atmospheric Sciences</i>, 67, 3984--4000, doi:10.1175/2010JAS3477.1.
recommended_citation: 'Jian Lu, Gang Chen and Dargan M. W. Frierson, 2010: The Position
  of the Midlatitude Storm Track and Eddy-Driven Westerlies in Aquaplanet AGCMs, <i>Journal
  of the Atmospheric Sciences</i>, 67, 3984--4000, doi:10.1175/2010JAS3477.1.'
paper_url: http://journals.ametsoc.org/doi/abs/10.1175/2010JAS3477.1
---

::: {.page-with-sidebar}

::: {.sidebar-col}
{{< include /_author-profile.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.content-col}

# The Position of the Midlatitude Storm Track and Eddy-Driven Westerlies in Aquaplanet AGCMs

*Published in Journal of the Atmospheric Sciences, 2010*

**Recommended citation:** Jian Lu, Gang Chen and Dargan M. W. Frierson, 2010: The Position of the Midlatitude Storm Track and Eddy-Driven Westerlies in Aquaplanet AGCMs, <i>Journal of the Atmospheric Sciences</i>, 67, 3984--4000, doi:10.1175/2010JAS3477.1.

[Download paper](http://journals.ametsoc.org/doi/abs/10.1175/2010JAS3477.1){target="_blank"}

:::

:::
